name: demandiq
description: Demand Intake Agent — conversational AI front door (prototype)

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix client run dev"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix client install
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix server run typecheck && npm --prefix client run typecheck
